title: Bob Sharen
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Bob}}
'''Bob Sharen''' is a comic book colorist who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
===Colorist===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 90|''Star Wars'' (1977) 90]]
*[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]]
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 1: Doomworld]]''
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters]]''
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 6: Wookiee World]]''
